landing.heroSubtitle: Stop rewriting the same idea 7 different ways. Paste a blog post, YouTube link, or any text — get perfectly formatted, platform-native content for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, Email & more in one click.
landing.joinCreators: Join {count} creators saving 5+ hours every week
landing.mockSample: We just launched our new AI feature that helps teams collaborate 10x faster. Here's what we learned building it from scratch in 30 days...

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your account to continue
auth.signupSubtitle: Start with 5 free repurposes. No credit card required.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSent: Check your inbox for {email}. Click the link to set a new password, then sign in.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
auth.supabaseNetworkError: Cannot reach Supabase. In .env.local set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY from your project (Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API), then restart npm run dev.
auth.checkEmailConfirm: Check your email for the confirmation link!
auth.callbackFailed: We couldn’t finish sign-in from that link. Try signing in with your password, or sign up again to get a new confirmation email.
auth.oauthCancelled: Sign-in was cancelled or the provider returned an error.

codes.PLAN_REQUIRED: This feature requires a Pro or Agency plan. Upgrade to unlock it.
codes.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
codes.INTERNAL: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
codes.BRAND_VOICE_NOT_FOUND: That brand voice isn’t available anymore. Clear it or pick another from Brand voice.
codes.BRAND_VOICE_SAMPLES_TOO_SHORT: Add more writing samples — we need enough text to learn your voice.

toast.brandVoicesProOnly: Brand voices are available on Pro and Agency plans.
toast.brandVoiceLimit: You've reached the limit of {max} brand voices for your plan.
toast.brandVoicePreviewTopicShort: Enter at least 10 characters describing your topic.
toast.limitVoicesReached: Limit reached ({max} voices for your plan).
toast.invalidWebhookUrl: Please enter a valid HTTPS URL (max 500 characters).
toast.webhookSaved: Webhook URL saved. New repurposes will be sent to Zapier.
toast.transcriptTooShort: Transcript is too short. Paste at least 100 characters.
toast.enterTopic: Please enter a topic or idea
toast.noConnectedAccounts: No connected accounts for these platforms. Connect LinkedIn or Twitter first.
toast.failedOn: Failed on: {list}. Check connections and try again.
toast.selectOneDelete: Select at least one item to delete
toast.partialDelete: Only {deleted} of {requested} items were removed. Refresh the page or try again.
toast.pasteMinBrandVoiceWords: Add at least {min} words total across your samples so we can learn your voice.
toast.enterBlogUrls: Enter 2–5 valid blog URLs (one per line or comma-separated)
toast.postInAppNotSupported: In-app post and schedule aren’t available for {platform} yet. Copy the text and publish from the app.
toast.cannotSchedule: Cannot schedule. Generate content again first.
toast.bulkPostProOnly: Bulk posting is available on Pro and Agency plans.
toast.noConnectedBulk: No connected accounts for the selected platforms.
toast.sampleContentInserted: Sample content added — replace with your own anytime.
toast.repurposeMilestone: 🎉 {count} repurposes done! You're on a roll.
toast.longPasteConsiderUrl: Long content detected — consider using URL input for best results.
toast.upgradeSuccess: 🎉 Plan upgraded! Welcome to the new features.
toast.paymentError: Payment failed. Please try again or contact support.
toast.paymentVerifyFailed: Could not verify payment. Contact support if amount was deducted.
